task_name: Add Local MVP Chain Checkpoint Through Approval Readiness
goal: Document the current local MVP chain through Approval Readiness Candidate and define the next safe boundary without enabling auth, persistence, approval recording, task creation, execution, or live Builder access.
claims: BP-061 documents the local MVP chain through Approval Readiness Candidate.
BP-061 identifies which chain stages are locally reviewable and which actions remain blocked.
BP-061 does not implement approval, auth, persistence, UI, Builder task creation, execution, secrets, DB, deploy, or live Builder access.
assumptions: BP-060 completed fixture coverage visibility for the Approval Readiness Candidate stage.
A checkpoint is needed before expanding toward auth, persistence, approval record, or Builder task-create readiness work.
The next safe step should remain a contract-only boundary.
dod: The document states the local chain stages, current review suite entry point, blocked actions, open gaps, and next safe step.
The document explicitly blocks approval effect, approval recording, auth implementation, persistence, Task Create, Execute, Approve, Push, Deploy, DB, and live Builder calls.
stop_conditions: Runtime, fixture, package, or tool changes become necessary
Effective approval, approval recording, auth, persistence, live Builder, DB, deploy, execution, task creation, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-060 made Approval Readiness Candidate fixture coverage visible and cleared the way for a local MVP chain checkpoint.
